store_headline: Complete Music WordPress Theme for Artists and Labels
store_subheadline: A complete platform for musicians, producers, and record labels to showcase and sell music
features: Video gallery with custom player options
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: Launched in 2015 with 3,000+ customers — the most proven music theme in the WolfThemes catalog
The most complete music feature set: discography, audio playlists, events, video galleries, photo albums, and WooCommerce merch
Bold crimson 'ALL ABOUT MUSIC' identity communicates music-first commitment from the first visit
WPBakery-powered with purpose-built music modules — ideal for buyers already using WPBakery
Currency switcher for international music sales — essential for artists and labels with global fanbases
The safe, proven, fully-featured choice when buyers won't compromise on features or bet on a new theme
Equally suited to musicians, bands, record labels, and producers — the versatility specialized themes sacrifice
key_benefits: Build a complete music platform: discography, events, videos, albums, and WooCommerce
Launch with confidence: 3,000+ customers and a decade of active development
Showcase releases, tour dates, videos, and merch in one cohesive site
Sell merch internationally with built-in currency switching, quick view, and wishlist
Attract musicians, bands, labels, and producers with a feature set that grows
Establish music credibility with a bold crimson identity built for music professionals

testimonials.text: This theme is very beautiful, complete and versatile. And the costumer support is very reactive. I recommend !
testimonials.author: aureliealibertdupuy

testimonials.text: This is not only a great looking theme...not only has some of the best features...but the support is AMAZING. Had a few tweaks that needed in order to customize, but overall a very easy theme to use and customize. And I have had HUGE reaction from users that have visited the site...and I only just launched it. BUY THIS THEME if you are a band or artist!!!!
testimonials.author: Jgarth

testimonials.text: Love this theme! It's beautifully designed, easy to use (love the fact that they use WP Bakery) and the customer support is great!!
testimonials.author: leonordl
